items.title: Bootstrap Hermes Orchestrator state
items.description: Replace scaffold templates with project-specific mission/design/plan/acceptance/feedback/backlog/state.

items.title: Fix frontend TypeScript compile errors
items.description: Repair current Explore/useVoices response mismatch and any subsequent compile errors.

items.title: Implement voice mapping UI
items.description: Add a usable flow for voice_mapping books to map discovered personas to voices and submit to backend.

items.title: Polish player export and state handling
items.description: Add download/share action, mapping-required state, error state, and empty/no-audio guidance.

items.title: Improve library progress indicators
items.description: Replace placeholder progress math with status-aware progress using available metadata/status fields.

items.title: Clean up MiniPlayer style declaration
items.description: Separate component closing brace and StyleSheet declaration for readability and safer future edits.

items.title: Harden API client and schemas
items.description: Make frontend API helpers resilient to backend error payloads, stream parsing issues, and optional fields.

items.title: Verify typed text upload on web/native
items.description: Ensure Blob/object URL based text upload works on web and has safe native behavior or disabled guidance.

items.title: Backend provider timeout and retry hardening
items.description: Add configurable bounded retries/backoff for OpenAI-compatible LLM/TTS provider calls; persistent segment requeue work was split to blg_backend_requeue_failed_segments.

items.title: Backend PDF/ePUB parser implementation
items.description: Replace PDF/ePUB parser stubs with bounded standard-library extraction. OCR provider implementation was split to blg_backend_ocr_provider.

items.title: Persistent character voice knowledge base
items.description: Persist character/persona traits from segmentation and attach stable VoiceDescription for TTS.

items.title: Requeue failed segmentation and synthesis work
items.description: Persist and requeue errored segmentation/TTS segments so long audiobook jobs can continue after transient failures instead of ending with partial synthesis errors.

items.title: Backend OCR provider implementation
items.description: Add real OCR provider integration for scanned PDFs/images while preserving configurable provider behavior and no committed secrets.

items.title: Remove unintended Deerflow frontend signature
items.description: Erroneous skill-derived branding task; watermark/signature removed because it was not requested by the project owner.

items.title: Add containerized E2E smoke stack
items.description: Add deterministic stub config, Docker Compose E2E stack, container Go test target, and API smoke scripts so the product can be validated without host Go or external providers.

items.title: Push validated ui branch to GitHub
items.description: Push local ui branch commits to origin after GitHub authentication is provided. Keep remote URL sanitized and avoid committing credentials.

items.title: Fix short-book voice mapping stall
items.description: Ensure books with fewer than MinSegmentsBeforeTTS segments still request initial voice mapping, continue synthesis after mapping, and keep UI polling voice_mapping status.

items.title: Add FlateDecode decompression to PDF parser
items.description: Add FlateDecode (zlib/deflate) stream decompression to the PDF parser in internal/parser/pdf.go so that compressed content streams from modern PDF libraries (fpdf2, ReportLab, wkhtmltopdf, LibreOffice) are decompressed before text extraction. Use Go stdlib compress/zlib and compress/flate. Must handle both FlateDecode filter detection and the actual decompression in extractStreams or a new decompressStream helper.

items.title: Implement Delete Book actions from player and Continue Listening menus
items.description: Add native dropdown actions for the player three-dot button and Continue Listening three-dot button. Include a Delete Book option that deletes the selected book through backend API and updates frontend query/cache/navigation state.

items.title: Persist reusable test voice samples
items.description: Generate missing voice preview samples after backend startup/TTS voice discovery and serve future Voices tab preview clicks from persistent filesystem storage instead of synthesizing each click.

items.title: Short Step 1: harden current Qwen3-TTS provider path
items.description: Keep current OpenAI-compatible qwen3-tts integration stable without vLLM-omni/workstation changes; verify provider/voice defaults and preserve cached voice previews.

items.title: Short Step 2: add single-user default voice setting
items.description: Persist a default voice for the single current user, expose GET/PUT API and make Voices tab display/change it.

items.title: Short Step 3: auto-map discovered personas to default voice
items.description: On upload/pipeline start, apply the default voice as the mapping for discovered personas so segmentation and synthesis start immediately without waiting for manual voice mapping.

items.title: Short Step 4: remap stale audio and prioritize fresh segments
items.description: When persona mappings change, prioritize future/newer segments with the new voice, mark old audio stale, and regenerate stale segments after current book synthesis completes.
